subcodes.first_line: My God, my God, my Lord and my Refuge! Thou seest one of Thy handmaidens who hath turned unto the dawning-place of Thy Manifestation after most men on the earth had turned away
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی و سیدی و سندی تری امه من امائک اقبلت الی افق ظهورک بعد اعراض اکثر
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for women, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @love of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
